title: Analytics - Help Guide Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Help Guide page in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or profile icon to access the side navigation.
Select 'Help' or 'Help Guide' from the navigation menu.
Observe that the Help Guide page loads.
expected: The app logs an analytics event in Firebase when the Help Guide page is opened. The event includes default analytics elements: event count graphs, event counts by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
